text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jostling alongside the senior year runners in the
Arima Kinen, Manhattan Cafe holds her own with
an impressive performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M Opera O likens her to "the companion of
Leckermaul," but the meaning of her comment
evades me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Manhattan Cafe's friend pulls ahead,
moving even further away from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe gives chase, but there's a
darkness behind her eyes, and her toenails are
suffering. Despite the sinking feeling in my
stomach, we prepare for the spring Tenno Sho.
